commit.subject: LU-19819: utils: enhance 'lctl getobjversion' usage message
commit.message:
LU-19819: utils: enhance 'lctl getobjversion' usage message

This commit update help messages to ensure a clean output.

Test-Parameters: trivial
Signed-off-by: Aurélien Cedeyn <acedeyn@ddn.com>
Change-Id: Id55ae86626b2a58a6325ec3938870f7d575d510d
